## P8.1D recommended cloud probe contract

- Liveness: process/container is running and host has not crashed.
- Readiness: SQL operational readiness report is Ready through `SqlOperationalWorkerStartupProbe`.
- Startup should not require `SqlOperationalQueueExecutor:RunId`.
- Idle worker with no runnable runs is healthy.
